create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the resource was created for auditing purposes

effective_labels.description: Inherited labels applied to the resource for organizational categorization

etag.description: Checksum for detecting changes to the resource state

id.description: Unique identifier for the resource used in other configurations

infrastructure.description: Type of infrastructure associated with the service connection policy

psc_connections.description: List of Private Service Connect connections tied to the policy

terraform_labels.description: Custom labels defined in Terraform for resource identification

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last update to the resource for tracking modifications
